chunks.content: Own funds requirements. Institutions shall at all times satisfy the following minimum capital ratios: (a) Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) ratio of 4.5%; (b) Tier 1 capital ratio of 6%; (c) Total capital ratio of 8%. Capital conservation buffer and countercyclical buffer apply in addition.

Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR). The LCR shall require credit institutions to maintain an adequate level of high-quality liquid assets (HQLA) that can be converted into cash to meet their liquidity needs over a 30-day stress scenario. LCR = HQLA / Total net cash outflows over 30 days >= 100%.

Net Stable Funding Ratio (NSFR). Institutions shall maintain a stable funding profile in relation to the composition of their assets and off-balance-sheet exposures. NSFR = Available stable funding / Required stable funding >= 100% over a one-year horizon.
